scripts.package: bun run build && bun build apps/server/src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --define 'process.env.NODE_ENV="production"' --external @struktoai/mirage-node && bun build apps/server/src/db/migrations/*.ts --root apps/server/src/db/migrations --outdir dist/migrations --target bun && rm -rf dist/web && mkdir -p dist/web && cp -R apps/server/dist/web/. dist/web
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p apps/server/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.e2e.json
scripts.test: bun run test:server && bun run test:web
